dimensions.name: IM Comprehension
dimensions.description: Understand WeCom chat history, contextual reasoning, tone analysis
dimensions.bottleneck: No access to WeCom — zero data intake capability
nextSteps: Await WeCom AI Agent API release

dimensions.name: Cognitive Mirroring
dimensions.description: Replicate user's thought process, decision logic, and conversational style
dimensions.bottleneck: Insufficient personal style training data; weak workplace EQ

dimensions.name: Communication & Coordination
dimensions.description: Cross-team/cross-department communication and coordination via digital channels
dimensions.bottleneck: Cannot initiate messages or operate any communication tools

dimensions.name: Document Authoring
dimensions.description: Solution proposals, PPTs, tender documents, meeting minutes, reports
dimensions.bottleneck: Missing internal templates and leadership style preferences

dimensions.name: Deep Analysis & Judgment
dimensions.description: Technical comparison, business judgment, risk identification, customer insight
dimensions.bottleneck: Lacks frontline industry intuition and internal strategic info

dimensions.name: Task Execution & Delivery
dimensions.description: Understand requirements, decompose tasks, deliver independently on time
dimensions.bottleneck: Cannot operate internal systems; most tasks need user input

dimensions.name: SA Domain Expertise
dimensions.description: Tencent Cloud product knowledge, industry solutions, pre-sales, project management
dimensions.bottleneck: Missing latest internal product updates; shallow client relationship understanding

changelog.detail: Built glassmorphism dashboard with thermometer, ETA countdown, LaunchAgent auto-start
